title: Thanthondreeswarar Temple
tagline: Thanthondreeswarar Temple — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Sri Thanthondreeswarar Temple or Sri Thanthondrieswarar Temple is at Belur in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.
overview.description: Sri Thanthondreeswarar Temple or Sri Thanthondrieswarar Temple is at Belur in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. The temple was built by the Cholas kingdom in the 12th century AD. The main deity is Lord Thanthondreeswarar (Lord Shiva) and the female deity is Goddess Dharmasamvarthini. Thanthondreeswarar Temple is located on the banks of Vasishta Nadi (Vasishta River). This temple comes under the Hindu Religious Charitable Endowment Department.

topPlaces.name: Belur, Tamil Nadu

topPlaces.name: Godumalai
topPlaces.description: Godumalai is a reserve forest and is located on the east side of Salem District of Tamil Nadu, India. The estimated terrain elevation is 553 meters above sea level.

topPlaces.description: Salem Cricket Foundation Stadium is a cricket stadium located in Salem district of Tamil Nadu, India. It was established in 2020 by Salem Cricket Foundation with assistance from Salem District Cricket Association and Tamil Nadu Cricket Association.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Thanthondreeswarar Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Thanthondreeswarar Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Thanthondreeswarar Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Tiruchirappalli International Airport (110 km) and the nearest railway station is Tiruchirappalli Junction (106 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Thanthondreeswarar Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Thanthondreeswarar Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Thanthondreeswarar Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Thanthondreeswarar Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Thanthondreeswarar Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Belur, Tamil Nadu, Tukkiyampalayam, Kurichi, Salem, Vazhapadi, Godumalai.
